name: PER_EXT_TYPE_PARAMS_VL
query: SELECT param.EXT_TYPE_PARAM_ID EXT_TYPE_PARAM_ID, param.EXT_TYPE_CODE EXT_TYPE_CODE, param_tl.TYPE_PARAM_NAME TYPE_PARAM_NAME, param.BASE_TYPE_PARAM_NAME BASE_TYPE_PARAM_NAME, param.ESS_TYPE_PARAM_NAME ESS_TYPE_PARAM_NAME, param.XML_TAG_NAME XML_TAG_NAME, param.DATA_TYPE DATA_TYPE, param.ALLOWED_IN_EXPRESSION ALLOWED_IN_EXPRESSION, param_tl.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, param.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, param.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, param.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, param.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, param.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, param.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, param.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, param.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, param.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, param.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, param.DEFAULT_HIDE_FLAG DEFAULT_HIDE_FLAG FROM PER_EXT_TYPE_PARAMS_B param, PER_EXT_TYPE_PARAMS_TL param_tl WHERE param.EXT_TYPE_PARAM_ID = param_tl.EXT_TYPE_PARAM_ID AND param_tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
